description: The correct, offline-first Suno CLI — every feature the abandoned clients have, plus a local SQLite library, full-text search, and agent-native output none of them ship.

novel_features.name: Lyric-line grep
novel_features.description: Find clips by remembered lyric, prompt, or tag phrases via local full-text search.

novel_features.name: Library analytics
novel_features.description: Grouped roll-ups across your whole library: counts, average duration/bpm, total plays and upvotes by any clip field.

novel_features.name: Variation lineage
novel_features.description: Render the iteration tree of a track: its extends, covers, and remixes, reconstructed from local links.

novel_features.name: Top tracks
novel_features.description: Ranked flat list of your best clips by plays, upvotes, or duration, with machine-readable output.

novel_features.name: Raw SQL
novel_features.description: Run read-only SQL directly against your local synced clip store.

novel_features.name: Credit throttle report
novel_features.description: Remaining credits plus your recent generation volume measured against Suno's captcha-throttle threshold.
